meta.multiSelectHint: Choose more than one if needed
meta.freeTextPlaceholder: Write as much or as little as you want.
meta.gentleReminderBody: You do not need perfect words to continue. A good match often begins with a few honest signals, not a complete explanation.
meta.gentleReminderShort: You can always add more detail later.
meta.gentleReminderLong: You can always switch back to the shorter path.
meta.continueTitle: A good first step should feel more grounded than random.
meta.continueDescription: You can take the quiz again, compare your recommendations once more, or head back to the homepage and continue from there when it feels right.

short.title: A short match, then a clearer next step.
short.description: This version keeps things light and gets you to a thoughtful recommendation quickly.
short.switchDescription: The longer path adds more detail about pace, preferences, and how you want the work to feel.

long.title: A fuller picture for a more precise match.
long.description: This version asks a little more so the recommendation can be more specific.
long.switchCta: Go back to the short version
long.switchDescription: You can always return to the shorter version if you want to move faster.

recommendations.title: Three professionals worth beginning with
recommendations.description: These are not random names from a directory. Each recommendation is tied to the kind of support, pace, and first impression you told us you were hoping for.
recommendations.callDescription: A short first call can help you hear their tone, ask about availability, and decide whether the first session feels right.
